# build-a-full-stack-application-for-a-school-to-man
> Generated by **VIA** — AI Digital Team Platform

## Task
Build a full stack application for a school to manage students, attendance, and grades with data saved

## Frontend
Deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.

## Backend
Deployed to Render.

## Run Locally
```bash
# Backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn main:app --reload

# Frontend
npm install && npm run dev
```
